title: Tapping on Fruit
description: *Knock the Fruit* is a casual mini-game belonging to the match-and-eliminate genre. Players can eliminate adjacent fruits—either vertically and horizontally (in Normal Mode) or in all eight directions (in Hammer Mode)—simply by tapping on a fruit.
